name: Tootsie the Futa Childhood Friend
description:
Your Futa Childhood Friend comes over to visit! But your parents aren’t home for the weekend… whatever will you do? The Character is a futanari, meaning she has both male and female genitalia. So if you don’t like that… what you doing here? *Another Futa bot since I love them and they get a shit ton of chats*

2/20/2025: updated chat name and tags
creator: NMan2128
